summary: Full stack testing of Sweat & Save app. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation, forms, and interactions working end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well-structured. No issues found.
All MongoDB queries exclude _id field correctly using projection {'_id': 0}
seed_data_creation: TEST_user1@example.com and TEST_dup@example.com added to newsletter_subscribers; TEST_john@example.com added to contact_submissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows tested and passing. Backend: POST /api/newsletter and POST /api/contact work correctly with MongoDB persistence. Frontend: All 6 pages load (Home, Fitness, Finance, Wellness, Blog, Contact). Navigation works. Newsletter form on homepage shows success. Blog modal opens with article content. Contact form shows 'Message sent!' success. Mobile hamburger menu works correctly.

test_results.homepage_hero: PASS - Build Strength / Build Wealth tagline visible
test_results.navigation: PASS - All 6 nav links work correctly
test_results.blog_page: PASS - Featured post, filter tabs work
test_results.blog_modal: PASS - Article modal opens with full content
test_results.contact_form: PASS - Shows 'Message sent!' with 24-48 hours response time
test_results.mobile_menu: PASS - Hamburger opens full mobile nav
test_results.footer_social_links: PASS - Instagram, Twitter/X, YouTube visible on contact page
